# Saudi Arabia

**Summary**: Geographic study area or location in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] conducted research at Saudi Arabia

- [[1991-makkawi|Makkawi, 1991]] located the study in the Zarghat area within Saudi Arabia.

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] conducted the study within a field in Saudi Arabia focusing on the Unayzah Formation.

- [[2003-al-shridi|Al-Shridi, 2003]] conducted research on an onshore field in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] conducted at King Fahd University in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]] focused on the treatment of groundwater in Saudi Arabia which is high in bromide content.

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] research performed in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] conducted research within the context of Saudi Arabian petroleum geology.

- [[2010-alroudhan|AlRoudhan, 2010]] conducted research within the context of Saudi Arabian oil fields.

- [[2011-salamah|Salamah, 2011]] conducted the study on a site in Saudi Arabia contaminated with crude oil.

- [[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011]] conducted a study on drinking water quality in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]] studied land reclamation along the eastern coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013]] studied MTBE contamination in groundwater within saudi-arabia.

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] focused on waste management in the context of saudi-arabia.

- [[2013-abdullah|Abdullah, 2013]] conducted study in Saudi Arabia context.

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] conducted research in a northern offshore area of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2014-abdallah|Abdallah, 2014]] conducted research on water treatment methods applicable to environmental hazards within the region.

- [[2014-adebayo|Adebayo, 2014]] conducted research within the context of Saudi Arabia's need for clean water sources.

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] conducted the study in the context of water scarcity and pollution in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] focused on the saudi-arabia region to evaluate unconventional resources in the Qusaiba Member.

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] conducted in Saudi Arabia at KFUPM.

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] conducted research in Saudi Arabia to utilize its abundant solar resources.

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] conducted research in Saudi Arabia context.

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-lawal|Lawal, 2016]] studied shale samples provided by the Ministry of Petroleum Resources in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] conducted in a university setting within Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] applied the method to data representing the Arab formation in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016]] conducted a rock physics study for a clastic reservoir in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] conducted research on microalgae in the Arabian Gulf region of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] focused on the Saudi Arabian portions of the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] focused on the application of halophilic bacteria in the Kingdom's oil production context.

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] conducted research to support sustainable development in Saudi Arabia by utilizing local industrial waste for water treatment.

- [[2017-benaafi|Benaafi, 2017]] studied the Wajid Group in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018]] used the Arid SEAM Phase II model to represent realistic conditions in Saudi Arabian deserts.

- [[2019-salawudeen|Salawudeen, 2019]] addressed the issue of cadmium and phenol in Saudi Arabian groundwater.

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] conducted research on air quality across the Arabian Peninsula in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022]] located in the Jafurah Sand Sea, Saudi Arabia.

- [[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019]] focused on the environmental challenges of hydrocarbon contamination in Saudi Arabian soil and water systems.

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] studied Ordovician reservoir channels in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020]] conducted at King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals in Dhahran, Saudi Arabia.

- [[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020]] addressed the need for water treatment in the context of Saudi Arabian environmental regulations.

- [[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020]] used data relevant to Saudi Arabian geological settings (e.g., Red Sea area).

- [[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020]] focused on a Saudi clastic field containing gas and oil.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] conducted the study within the context of Saudi Arabian reservoirs.

- [[2021-almashhor|AlMashhor, 2021]] the study included data mimicking a field in northeast Saudi Arabia.

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] conducted at a university in Saudi Arabia (implied by institution context).

- [[2021-albensaad|Albensaad, 2021]] studied carbonate mudrocks in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] investigated glacial deposits within the Saudi Arabian territory.

- [[2021-siddiq|Siddiq, 2021]] studied arsenic removal in the context of Saudi Arabian groundwater.

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] focused on the water scarcity issues and industrial applications within Saudi Arabia.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] applied the model to wells located in Saudi Arabia fields.

- [[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022]] located in Saudi Arabia, specifically within the Jafurah sub-basin.

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] conducted research in saudi-arabia to address local water shortage problems.

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] N/A

- [[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022]] conducted field studies in Saudi Arabia at Wadi Malham and Wadi Nisah.

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] studied microplastic contamination on the East coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] studied sand samples collected from various desert regions in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] conducted research on mudrocks within Saudi Arabian formations.

- [[2022-salih|Salih, 2022]] conducted a study on carbonate samples from various formations in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] focused on waste management challenges within saudi-arabia.

- [[2022-awais|Awais, 2022]] conducted at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals.

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] conducted research on core samples from wells located in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] applied the methodology to scenarios relevant to the region's geology.

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] conducted in Saudi Arabia for industrial applications.

- [[2023-al-garni|Al-Garni, 2023]] conducted in a laboratory setting within Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-aldhafeeri|Aldhafeeri, 2023]] conducted in a laboratory setting within Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] Not stated in source

- [[2023-muhammad|Muhammad, 2023]] conducted study within the context of Saudi Arabian geosciences.

- [[2023-arrofi|Arrofi, 2023]] studied the Jizan geothermal field in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-alabbad|Alabbad, 2024]] conducted research on carbonate reservoirs within Saudi Arabia and related global analogs.

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] conducted research on sand dunes within the context of dry areas in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] conducted the study in a sand dune located in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-almutawa|AlMutawa, 2024]] conducted field sampling within the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] conducted research at King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] conducted a study on air quality in various regions of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-chavanidis|Chavanidis, 2024]] conducted research within saudi-arabia to explore geothermal potential.

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] conducted research focused on arid and hyper-arid environments within the region.

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] studied Ediacaran sequences in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] studied the Marrat Formation in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-muharrag|Muharrag, 2024]] conducted study in the Dam Formation within Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] conducted research on carbonate rocks in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2025-oyekan|Oyekan, 2025]] conducted study in sand dunes located in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] conducted research in saudi-arabia focusing on the Hanifa Formation.

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] conducted study in the northern region of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] conducted research on carbonate mudrocks within the context of Saudi Arabian geology.

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] studied industrial air pollution in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] conducted research in the context of groundwater protection in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] studied carbon mineralization potential within saudi-arabia.

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] studied TWW surplus and aquifer recharge potential in Saudi Arabia.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] studied the Late Cretaceous rocks in Saudi Arabia.

- [[1985-ghaled|Ghaled, 1985]] located in the study area within the northern part of the Arabian Shield.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- conducted research at Saudi Arabia ([[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]])

- Located at approximately 250 km NE of Al-Madina. ([[1991-makkawi|Makkawi, 1991, p. 20]])

- Not stated in source ([[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]])

- The Arab-D Formation is part of the Upper Jurassic section in Saudi Arabia. ([[2003-al-shridi|Al-Shridi, 2003, p. 18]])

- Not stated in source ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]])

- Saudi Arabian groundwater is coincidentally high in bromide content, making bromate formation a significant risk during ozonation. ([[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009, p. 13]])

- Not applicable for this study's primary data. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]])

- Not stated in source ([[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]])

- Not stated in source ([[2010-alroudhan|AlRoudhan, 2010]])

- The study was conducted at an Aramco-contaminated site within Saudi Arabia. ([[2011-salamah|Salamah, 2011, p. 11]])

- Most drinking water is a blend of desalinated sea water and raw groundwater. ([[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011, p. 11]])

- Rapid development in infrastructure and lifestyle occurred since 1930s. ([[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012, p. 19]])

- Approximately 90% of water withdrawn in 2006 was from groundwater. ([[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013, p. 13]])

- Not stated in source ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]])

- Not applicable to specific local findings. ([[2013-abdullah|Abdullah, 2013]])

- Not stated in source ([[2013-atig|atig, 2013]])

- Not stated in source ([[2014-abdallah|Abdallah, 2014]])

- Saudi Arabia is a major producer of MTBE and faces severe water scarcity due to its arid climate. ([[2014-adebayo|Adebayo, 2014, p. 14]])

- Saudi Arabia faces a shortage of freshwater resources, making it imperative to keep water free from pollution. ([[2015-musa|Musa, 2015, p. 18]])

- Qusaiba mudstones are found from the edge of the Arabian Shield eastward to the Zagros. ([[2015-own|Own, 2015, p. 32]])

- Not stated in source. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]])

- Saudi Arabia is situated in a prime location with average solar radiation of 2200 kWh/m2. ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015, p. 20]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]])

- Not stated in source ([[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]])

- Saudi Arabia is an emerging target for unconventional shale exploration. ([[2016-lawal|Lawal, 2016, p. 19]])

- Not stated in source ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]])

- Not stated in source ([[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]])

- Data from four wells in Saudi Arabia were used to validate the stiff-sand model. ([[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016, p. 17]])

- Very few investigations related to algae-based biofuel production have been carried out in Saudi Arabia so far. ([[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016, p. 11]])

- The study covers a range of environments including shallow to deep marine areas in the Saudi Arabian portion of the Gulf. ([[2017-amao|Amao, 2017, p. 75]])

- Oil production in 2015 reached 10.19 million barrels per day. ([[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017, p. 23]])

- Sustainable development in Saudi Arabia entails maintenance of the limited water sources available. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 32]])

- The NW-SE trending lineament set is the most dominant in the eastern part of the study area. ([[2017-benaafi|Benaafi, 2017, p. 71]])

- The Arid SEAM Phase II model is a representation of strong geological heterogeneity of the arid desert areas of the Saudi Arabian. ([[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018, p. 14]])

- Groundwater in some areas like Wadi Fatimah was found to contain high cadmium concentrations. ([[2019-salawudeen|Salawudeen, 2019, p. 19]])

- Analyzed data from multiple sites including Jubail and Ras Tanura within the country. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 23]])

- Study area covers approximately 40,000 km2 within a high humidity belt. ([[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022, p. 37]])

- Saudi Arabia relies heavily on groundwater for drinking and irrigation, making local soil remediation critical. ([[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019, p. 18]])

- Focuses on the challenge of characterizing fluids in these specific reservoirs. ([[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019, p. 15]])

- Not stated in source ([[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020]])

- Regulations in KSA limit ammonia content to 3 mg/L for discharge into coastal waters. ([[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020, p. 23]])

- Salt velocity in the Red Sea area is commonly assumed as 4500 m/s. ([[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020, p. 14]])

- This is the first such study applied to a Saudi clastic reservoir. ([[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020, p. 15]])

- Focused on Paleozoic tight sand and shale reservoirs in KSA. ([[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020, p. 1]])

- Synthetic data mimicked a field recorded on a small geological outcrop in the region. ([[2021-almashhor|AlMashhor, 2021, p. 75]])

- Not stated in source ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]])

- The study focused on Kimmeridgian (Late Jurassic) formations within the country. ([[2021-albensaad|Albensaad, 2021, p. 1]])

- Identified as a complex sequence of glacial and periglacial deposits extending from the Arabian Plate to North Africa. ([[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021, p. 31]])

- Saudi Arabia is the 3rd largest producer of Date-palms globally, providing a source for biochar production. ([[2021-siddiq|Siddiq, 2021, p. 16]])

- Saudi Arabia is one of the largest producers of desalinated water but faces severe internal freshwater scarcity. ([[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021, p. 18]])

- Data from 9 specific wells across onshore and offshore locations in Saudi Arabia were used for validation. ([[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021, p. 43]])

- The study area includes a variety of carbonate and evaporite settings across the Arabian platform. ([[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022, p. 33]])

- One common issue in Saudi Arabia is the existence of limited in-situ groundwater data. ([[2022-karami|Karami, 2022, p. 30]])

- N/A ([[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]])

- Outcrops are located in the central part of Saudi Arabia. ([[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022, p. 5]])

- Not stated in source ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]])

- Sands cover one third of the Arabian Peninsula. ([[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022, p. 17]])

- Study areas include Qusaiba Member (NW Saudi Arabia) and Jurassic carbonate mudrocks. ([[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022, p. 24]])

- Samples were collected from six different formations across the country. ([[2022-salih|Salih, 2022, p. 20]])

- Saudi Arabia produces over 15 million tons of solid waste annually. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 13]])

- Not stated in source ([[2022-awais|Awais, 2022]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]])

- The variability (10–30%) of the model parameters was selected based on the expected variation in the modeled geophysical properties, such as velocity and resistivity, in Saudi Arabia. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 41]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-al-garni|Al-Garni, 2023]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-aldhafeeri|Aldhafeeri, 2023]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-muhammad|Muhammad, 2023]])

- Jizan exhibited three permeable zones: Zone A (Bani Malik), Zone B (Al Ardah), and Zone C (between Al Ardah and Al Khouba). ([[2023-arrofi|Arrofi, 2023, p. 17]])

- Not stated in source ([[2024-alabbad|Alabbad, 2024]])

- Not stated in source ([[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]])

- The study was performed on a sand dune in Dammam, Eastern Province. ([[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024, p. 57]])
